# HPD.ML.Transforms

Generated from published HPD ML `0.5.0` packages.

## HPD-ML-Transforms

- [`BinNormalizeLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-binnormalizelearner.md) - Fits a BinNormalizeTransform by computing quantile boundaries.
- [`BinNormalizeTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-binnormalizetransform.md) - Assigns values to bins using equal-density (quantile) binning. Output is the bin index normalized to [0, 1].
- [`BinParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-binparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`HashTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-hashtransform.md) - Hashes column values to a fixed-size integer range (feature hashing / hashing trick).
- [`ImageLoadTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-imageloadtransform.md) - Loads image files referenced by a path column into byte arrays.
- [`ImagePixelExtractTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-imagepixelextracttransform.md) - Extracts pixel values from an image byte array as a float tensor. Output shape: [channels, height, width] (CHW format for ONNX/PyTorch). Concrete implementation deferred to platform-specific image library.
- [`ImageResizeTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-imageresizetransform.md) - Resizes images (as byte arrays) to target width and height. Concrete implementation deferred to platform-specific image library.
- [`KeyToValueTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-keytovaluetransform.md) - Maps integer keys back to original string values. The inverse of ValueToKeyTransform.
- [`MeanVarianceNormalizeLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-meanvariancenormalizelearner.md) - Fits a MeanVarianceNormalizeTransform by computing column statistics.
- [`MeanVarianceNormalizeTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-meanvariancenormalizetransform.md) - Normalizes to zero mean and unit variance (z-score normalization). Formula: (value - mean) / stddev
- [`MeanVarianceParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-meanvarianceparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`MinMaxNormalizeLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-minmaxnormalizelearner.md) - Fits a MinMaxNormalizeTransform by scanning data for min/max.
- [`MinMaxNormalizeTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-minmaxnormalizetransform.md) - Scales column values to [scaleMin, scaleMax] range. Formula: (value - dataMin) / (dataMax - dataMin) * (scaleMax - scaleMin) + scaleMin
- [`MissingValueDropTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-missingvaluedroptransform.md) - Drops rows where specified columns have missing values.
- [`MissingValueIndicateTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-missingvalueindicatetransform.md) - Adds a boolean indicator column that is true where the source column is missing.
- [`MissingValueParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-missingvalueparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`MissingValueReplaceLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-missingvaluereplacelearner.md) - Fits a MissingValueReplaceTransform by computing mean/median/mode.
- [`MissingValueReplaceTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-missingvaluereplacetransform.md) - Replaces missing/NaN/null values with a replacement value.
- [`MutualInfoFeatureSelectionLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-mutualinfofeatureselectionlearner.md) - Fits a MutualInfoFeatureSelectionTransform by computing mutual information between each feature column and the label, then selecting top-K.
- [`MutualInfoFeatureSelectionTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-mutualinfofeatureselectiontransform.md) - Selects top-K features by mutual information with a label column. Mutual information measures the dependency between each feature and the label: MI(X,Y) = Σ p(x,y) * log(p(x,y) / (p(x) * p(y))) Discretizes continuous features into bins before computing MI.
- [`MutualInfoParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-mutualinfoparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`NormalizationParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-normalizationparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`OneHotEncodeLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-onehotencodelearner.md) - Fits a OneHotEncodeTransform by scanning for unique values.
- [`OneHotEncodeTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-onehotencodetransform.md) - Encodes a categorical column as indicator (one-hot) vectors. Unknown values map to all-zeros.
- [`OneHotParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-onehotparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ReplacementStrategy`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-replacementstrategy.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ReplacementValue`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-replacementvalue.md) - Replacement value for missing data.
- [`ResizeMode`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-resizemode.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`TextFeaturizeLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-textfeaturizelearner.md) - All-in-one text featurization: tokenize, lowercase, remove stopwords, n-grams, TF-IDF.
- [`TextFeaturizeOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-textfeaturizeoptions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`TextFeaturizeParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-textfeaturizeparameters.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`TextFeaturizeTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-textfeaturizetransform.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`TransformExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-transformextensions.md) - C# 14 extension members for transform and learner discovery.
- [`TypeConvertTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-typeconverttransform.md) - Converts a column from one CLR type to another using Convert.ChangeType.
- [`ValueToKeyTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-transforms-valuetokeytransform.md) - Maps string/value columns to integer keys. The inverse of KeyToValueTransform.
